privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Snipe-IT assets created via setup_task.sh. It explicitly requires creating 'Pending E-Waste' and 'Donated' labels and processing specific target assets: Laptops (LT-RET-01 to LT-RET-04) and Tablets (TAB-RET-01 to TAB-RET-03). The required donation note is 'Donated to Lincoln High School'. Printers (PRN-RET-01, PRN-RET-02) serve as a control group that must remain unaffected.
